tasks.label: codex:lanes:setup-worktrees
args: $repo='${workspaceFolder}'; $base=Join-Path $repo '.worktrees'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $base | Out-Null; Set-Location $repo; $map=@{ 'contracts-interfaces'='rewrite/v2-lane-contracts-interfaces'; 'startup-bootstrap'='rewrite/v2-lane-startup-bootstrap'; 'domain-core-models'='rewrite/v2-lane-domain-core-models'; 'ingestion-pipeline'='rewrite/v2-lane-ingestion-pipeline'; 'infrastructure-adapters'='rewrite/v2-lane-infrastructure-adapters'; 'plugins-device-system'='rewrite/v2-lane-plugins-device-system'; 'runtime-composition'='rewrite/v2-lane-runtime-composition'; 'docs-pseudocode-traceability'='rewrite/v2-lane-docs-pseudocode-traceability'; 'tests-v2-harness'='rewrite/v2-lane-tests-v2-harness'; 'ci-v2-gates'='rewrite/v2-lane-ci-v2-gates' }; foreach ($k in $map.Keys) { $path = Join-Path $base $k; if (Test-Path $path) { Write-Host "exists: $path"; continue }; git worktree add $path $map[$k] }; Write-Host 'worktree setup done'

tasks.label: codex:lanes:coordination
args: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}'; git switch rewrite/v2; Write-Host 'Ready: coordination terminal on rewrite/v2'

tasks.label: lane:contracts-interfaces
args: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}/.worktrees/contracts-interfaces'; git switch rewrite/v2-lane-contracts-interfaces; Write-Host 'Ready: contracts-interfaces'

tasks.label: lane:startup-bootstrap
args: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}/.worktrees/startup-bootstrap'; git switch rewrite/v2-lane-startup-bootstrap; Write-Host 'Ready: startup-bootstrap'

tasks.label: lane:domain-core-models
args: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}/.worktrees/domain-core-models'; git switch rewrite/v2-lane-domain-core-models; Write-Host 'Ready: domain-core-models'

tasks.label: lane:ingestion-pipeline
args: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}/.worktrees/ingestion-pipeline'; git switch rewrite/v2-lane-ingestion-pipeline; Write-Host 'Ready: ingestion-pipeline'

tasks.label: lane:infrastructure-adapters
args: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}/.worktrees/infrastructure-adapters'; git switch rewrite/v2-lane-infrastructure-adapters; Write-Host 'Ready: infrastructure-adapters'

tasks.label: lane:plugins-device-system
args: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}/.worktrees/plugins-device-system'; git switch rewrite/v2-lane-plugins-device-system; Write-Host 'Ready: plugins-device-system'

tasks.label: lane:runtime-composition
args: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}/.worktrees/runtime-composition'; git switch rewrite/v2-lane-runtime-composition; Write-Host 'Ready: runtime-composition'

tasks.label: lane:tests-v2-harness
args: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}/.worktrees/tests-v2-harness'; git switch rewrite/v2-lane-tests-v2-harness; Write-Host 'Ready: tests-v2-harness'

tasks.label: lane:ci-v2-gates
args: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}/.worktrees/ci-v2-gates'; git switch rewrite/v2-lane-ci-v2-gates; Write-Host 'Ready: ci-v2-gates'
